reasoning: Emotional (60%): The bombbug reads as warm, charming, and friendly — saturated orange body with a white belly, vivid blue goggles accent, and a slightly spread-arm 'active' pose that communicates lively energy without any menace. The palette hits the bright warm Hyrule toy-diorama mood squarely; rounded silhouette with stubby limbs reinforces the friendly register. No grim or scary qualities. Emotional score ~8.5. Technical (40%): At the zoomed views on both dark and light backgrounds, hard 1px black outlines are clearly visible with no anti-aliasing bleed. Body shading uses a clean 3-tone ramp (highlight orange, mid orange, dark shadow/outline) consistent with hand-pixeled hard shading conventions. Pixels are grid-snapped with no sub-pixel artifacts. Matches Denzi-tier construction: distinct silhouette, limited per-zone palette, crisp outlines. Technical score ~8. Combined: 0.6×8.5 + 0.4×8 = 8.3, rounded to 8.
